EAC.209/036

REPUBLIC OF TANGANYIKA

Instrument of Accession to

Protocol for the Prohibition of tho Use in Nar of Asphyxiating,

Polsonous or other Gases, and of Bacteriological Methods of

Marfaro, 1925.

WHEREAS a Protocol for the Prohibition of the Use of

Asphyxiating, Poisonous or other Gases, and af Bacteriological

Methods of Warfaro mas drawn up at Genera on the 17th of June, 1925, and signed by representatives of the Goverzmenta of certain Powers and States;

WHEREAS the Goverrment of the Republic of Tanganyika having seen and considered the said Protocol, deem it expedient to accede thereto;

NOW THEREFORE the undersigned JULIUS K. BRERE, President of the Republio of Tanganyike hereby declares that the Gorernment of the Republio of Tangarvika accedo to the aforesaid Protocol and undertake to perform and carry out all the stipulations and provisions therein contained,

IN WITNESS whereof the undersigned, duly authorised, has signed and sealed this instrument.

Dono at Dar es salaam on the. 28..

... day of FEBRUART,

1963.

julius K. Merere

President.
